Class InventoryItem

java.lang.Object
com.team62.model.InventoryItem
public class InventoryItem extends Object
Model representing an inventory item for the manager UI. inventoryItemId is a UI id. dbId stores the real UUID from the \"Inventory_Quantity\".inventory_id column.
